# Claimer

> Source-backed community assessment for public AI and technology claims.

Claimer separates attribution accuracy from claim veracity. Every public claim includes a source URL and an evidence chain with support, challenge, or context entries.

## Core Pages
- Home: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/
- Claims: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/
- Topics: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/topics/
- Sources: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/sources/
- Review queue: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/review/
- Submit: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/submit/
- Data exports: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/data/

## Machine-Readable Data
- Claim pack JSON: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/api/claims.json
- ClaimReview JSON: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/api/claimreview.json
- RSS feed: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/feed.xml
- JSON Feed: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/feed.json
- Sitemap: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/sitemap.xml

## Corpus Snapshot
- Claims: 90
- Sources: 62
- Latest generated: 2026-05-26T11:47:25.701Z

## Recent Claims
- HaystackID expands AI-driven privacy and legal discovery solutions for Europe targeting EU AI Act, GDPR, and DORA compliance: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/haystackid-eu-ai-act-compliance-expansion-2026/
- AIC unveils next-gen AI infrastructure for the 'Agentic AI era' with NVIDIA CMX platform integration at COMPUTEX 2026: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/aic-agentic-ai-infrastructure-computex-2026/
- TELUS Digital reports every AI model tested was exploitable in 620,000+ adversarial attack benchmark across 34 models: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/telus-digital-genai-safety-benchmark-2026/
- Pope Leo XIV issues encyclical 'Magnifica Humanitas' calling for AI regulation and denouncing autonomous lethal weapons: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/pope-leo-xiv-magnifica-humanitas-ai/
- Gartner predicts 40% of enterprises will demote or decommission autonomous AI agents by 2027 due to governance gaps: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/gartner-ai-agent-governance-2027/
- Google has officially overhauled its search engine to be entirely powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash AI: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/google-gemini-search-overhaul-2026/
- Huawei announces proprietary LogicFolding technology breakthrough, aims to produce 1.4nm chips by 2031: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/huawei-14nm-logicfolding-2026/
- Airbnb CTO Ahmad Al-Dahle warns new grad hiring by tech companies has dropped 50% since 2019 due to AI automating entry-level tasks: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/airbnb-cto-ai-hollowing-out-2026/
- ClickUp announces 22% layoffs while restructuring around AI, offering salary bands up to $1M for high-impact AI workers: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/clickup-ai-restructuring-2026/
- Market analysts warn major cloud providers' AI revenue comes substantially from startups they themselves fund, creating circular financing comparable to dot-com era patterns: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/ai-circular-financing-2026/
- Pope Leo XIV issues first papal encyclical on AI, calling for 'disarming' of artificial intelligence: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/pope-leo-xiv-ai-encyclical-2026/
- OpenAI is reportedly preparing a confidential IPO filing, targeting a late-2026 public debut: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/openai-confidential-ipo-filing-2026/
- Anthropic projects first-ever quarterly operating profit of $559M on $10.9B revenue in Q2 2026: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/anthropic-first-quarterly-profit-2026/
- Stability AI releases Stable Audio 3.0 with professional-grade AI music generation over 6 minutes long: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/stability-ai-audio-3-launch-2026/
- PwC commits to training 30,000 professionals on Claude, reporting up to 70% faster software delivery: https://claimer-org.github.io/claimer/claims/pwc-anthropic-30k-professionals-2026/
